hero.subtitle: Prove your trading skills, access funded capital, and trade in a structured environment designed for serious traders.

howItWorks.step3Desc: Access a funded account and start trading under firm conditions.

traderStories.title: Built by Traders, for Traders

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Choose a challenge size, complete registration, and begin trading on our platform. The evaluation starts immediately after payment confirmation.
faq.a2: Challenge fees are one-time and non-refundable. However, you keep your full profit share once funded.
faq.q3: How long until I get funded?
faq.a3: After reaching the profit target and completing the minimum trading days, account verification typically takes 1-3 business days.
faq.q4: How do I withdraw my profits?
faq.a4: Profits can be withdrawn via Fiper Card (instant) or bank transfer after the minimum funded trading period.
faq.a5: Access forex, indices, commodities, and selected cryptocurrencies across MT4, MT5, and cTrader platforms.
faq.a6: No formal experience required, but understanding risk management and the trading rules is essential for success.

finalCta.title: Start your challenge today and take your trading to the next level.

footer.riskDisclosure: Trading simulated accounts involves substantial risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results. All accounts offered are demo accounts with simulated funds.

about.title: Engineered for Fast, Smart Trading

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Fiper Global was founded with a vision to empower traders worldwide. FPT represents our commitment to professional trading infrastructure, combining rigorous evaluation standards with exceptional trader support.

mission.title: The FPT Mission
mission.content: We believe skilled traders deserve access to capital without unnecessary barriers. FPT provides a transparent, structured path from evaluation to funded trading.
